complete_a_workout_to_see_your_burn_anal: Complete a workout to see your burn analytics here
using_met_value_of_10_0_for_high_intensi: * Using MET value of 10.0 for high-intensity intervals
total_burn_active_calories_10_epoc_bonus: Total Burn = Active Calories + 10% EPOC Bonus
active_calories_met_3_5_weight_kg_200_du: Active Calories = (MET × 3.5 × Weight kg / 200) × Duration min
excess_post_exercise_oxygen_consumption_: Excess Post-Exercise Oxygen Consumption means your body continues burning calories at an elevated rate for up to 24-48 hours after your HIIT workout. We add a 10% EPOC bonus to your active calorie burn to give you the full picture of your total energy expenditure.
high_intensity_interval_training_alterna: High-Intensity Interval Training alternates short bursts of intense exercise with recovery periods. This method maximizes calorie burn, improves cardiovascular fitness, and triggers the "afterburn effect" (EPOC) - meaning you continue burning calories for hours after your workout ends.
